name: channel3
description: Product search, discovery, and API integration skills powered by Channel3

plugins.name: channel3-api
plugins.description: Integrate with the Channel3 API to search products, find similar items, look up product URLs, track prices, and earn affiliate commissions across TypeScript, Python, and REST

plugins.name: product-discovery
plugins.description: Search for real product data — prices, availability, merchant links, and 'more like this' recommendations — across thousands of retailers using bundled shell scripts
